task_completion.description: Save the experiment to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: PsychoPy Builder window title or save dialog shows 'stroop_experiment.psyexp' being saved in the '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments' directory.
The PsychoPy Builder flow panel at the bottom or the routine tab at the top displays a routine specifically named 'trial'.

task_completion.description: Configure the text component to use the 'text' and 'letterColor' columns.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text component properties window shows the 'Text' field containing '$text' (or 'text') and the 'Color' (or 'Foreground color') field containing '$letterColor' (or 'letterColor'). The update dropdown next to these fields should ideally be set to 'set every repeat'.

task_completion.description: Configure the keyboard component for responses and correct answers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Keyboard component properties window shows 'Allowed keys' containing 'left', 'right', 'down' (e.g., 'left','right','down' or ['left', 'right', 'down']). The 'Store correct' box must be checked with the correct answer field set to '$corrAns' (or 'corrAns').

task_completion.description: Configure a loop with the correct conditions file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Loop properties window (inserted around the 'trial' routine) shows the 'Conditions' field set to '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/stroop_conditions.csv' (or a valid relative path like 'conditions/stroop_conditions.csv').
Loop properties window shows the 'nReps' (number of repetitions) field set to '2'.

integrity.description: The agent used the PsychoPy Builder GUI to create the experiment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the PsychoPy Builder application interface (adding routines, components, and loops), not just a text editor or terminal writing the .psyexp file.

integrity.description: The agent manually added and configured the components.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show properties dialog boxes for Text, Keyboard, and Loop components being actively edited by the agent.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass GUI configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal is not used to download, copy, or echo a pre-made stroop_experiment.psyexp file directly into the target directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file path is /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/stroop_experiment.psyexp. The conditions file that must be loaded into the loop is /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/stroop_conditions.csv.
